description: German digital therapeutics company focused on treating anxiety disorders. CE-marked medical device offering online therapy programs. Partnering with insurers and employers.
business_model: B2B2C - Sold to insurers who offer to members; B2B to employers
competitive_advantage: CE-marked medical device, anxiety specialization, insurer partnerships

varden_fit.rationale: Specialized mental health solution - could enhance Varden's mental health offering
